case_title: STATE OF NORTH DAKOTA EX REL.LISA K FAIR MCEVERS et al VS. METRO-TRAK, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: ISSUANCE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENTPL FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF NORTH DAKOTA EX REL.LISA K FAIR MCEVERS COMMISSIONER OF LABOR, FOR THE BENEFIT OF SHERRY LIND MORPHEW, ROBERT MUELLER, NANCY SAXBERG, LOIS SHAWN-STOKKELAND, KELLEY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORPHEW, ROBERT MUELLER, NANCY SAXBERG, LOIS SHAWN-STOKKELAND, KELLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT METRO-TRAK, LLC SCHWARTZ, DAVIS INDIVIDUALLY, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY $34,173.66 PRINCIPAL, $2,239.98 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $36,413.64, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORPHEW, ROBERT SERVED APR-11-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHWARTZ, DAVIS INDIVIDUALLY, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON MAY-12-2008 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
